name: cc-triad-dev
description: Claude Code three-agent orchestration pipeline: architect (Opus design) → glm-coder (GLM-5.1 cloud implementation) → codex-reviewer (Codex independent review), with optional kimi-vision (Kimi-K2.5 cloud multimodal) for image inputs. Routes each phase to its strongest model instead of relying on one generalist. Triggers automatically on feature requests, bug fixes, and UI mockups.
